name: cap
title: Cap
description: Control Cap screen recorder — start, stop, pause, resume, screenshot and more, all from Raycast.
author: cap

commands.name: start-recording
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Start a new Cap screen recording.

commands.name: stop-recording
commands.title: Stop Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Stop the current Cap recording and open the editor.

commands.name: restart-recording
commands.title: Restart Recording
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Discard and restart the current Cap recording.

commands.name: toggle-camera
commands.title: Toggle Camera
commands.subtitle: Cap
commands.description: Show or hide the camera overlay in Cap.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
